Title: Verify Data Synchronization Between Local User and Firebase
Preconditions:
- Local user is logged in.
- Data organizer is initialized.
- Firebase service is active.
Test Data:
- User ID: 12345
- Data to be synchronized: User profile information.
Test Steps:
1. Local user logs into the application.
2. Data organizer retrieves user profile information.
3. Data organizer sends the data to Firebase.
4. Firebase processes the data and stores it.
Expected Result: - User profile information is successfully synchronized between the local user and Firebase.

Title: Verify Data Retrieval from Data Organizer to Data Display
Preconditions:
- Local user is logged in.
- Data organizer is initialized.
- Firebase service is active.
Test Data:
- User ID: 12345
- Data to be retrieved: User profile information.
Test Steps:
1. Local user logs into the application.
2. Data display requests user profile information from the data organizer.
3. Data organizer retrieves the user profile information from Firebase.
4. Data organizer sends the data to the data display.
Expected Result: - User profile information is successfully displayed on the data display.

Title: Create a New Chat
Preconditions:
- Local user is logged in.
- Chat component is initialized.
Test Steps:
1. Local user initiates a new chat with another user.
2. Chat component creates a new chat record.
3. Chat component associates the chat with both users.
Expected Result: - A new chat record is created and associated with both users.

Title: Send a Message in an Existing Chat
Preconditions:
- Local user is logged in.
- Chat component is initialized.
- Chat exists between two users.
Test Data:
- Message content: "Hello, how are you?"
- Sender user ID: 12345
- Receiver user ID: 67890
Test Steps:
1. Local user sends a message in the existing chat.
2. Chat component creates a new message record.
3. Chat component associates the message with the chat and sender/receiver users.
Expected Result: - A new message record is created and associated with the chat and users.

Title: Verify Message Belongs to User
Preconditions:
- Local user is logged in.
- Chat component is initialized.
- Message is sent in an existing chat.
Test Steps:
1. Local user checks if the message belongs to them.
2. Chat component verifies the association between the message and the user.
Expected Result: - The message is correctly associated with the user.

Title: Add a Fridge to a User
Preconditions:
- Local user is logged in.
- Fridge component is initialized.
Test Steps:
1. Local user adds a new fridge to their account.
2. Fridge component creates a new fridge record.
3. Fridge component associates the fridge with the user.
Expected Result: - A new fridge record is created and associated with the user.

Title: Remove a Product from a Fridge
Preconditions:
- Local user is logged in.
- Fridge component is initialized.
- Fridge contains at least one product.
Test Steps:
1. Local user removes a product from the fridge.
2. Fridge component sends a request to Firebase to remove the product.
3. Firebase processes the request and updates the fridge inventory.
Expected Result: - The product is successfully removed from the fridge and the inventory is updated.

Title: Verify Product Removal from Firebase
Preconditions:
- Local user is logged in.
- Fridge component is initialized.
- Product is removed from the fridge.
Test Steps:
1. Local user verifies if the product has been removed from the fridge.
2. Fridge component checks the inventory in Firebase.
Expected Result: - The product is correctly removed from the fridge and the inventory is updated.

Title: Create a New Post
Preconditions:
- Local user is logged in.
- Post component is initialized.
Test Data:
- Post content: "I need apples."
- User ID: 12345
- Fridge ID: 67890
Test Steps:
1. Local user creates a new post.
2. Post component creates a new post record.
3. Post component associates the post with the user and fridge.
Expected Result: - A new post record is created and associated with the user and fridge.

Title: Verify Post Association with User and Fridge
Preconditions:
- Local user is logged in.
- Post component is initialized.
- Post is created.
Test Data:
- Post ID: 12345
- User ID: 12345
- Fridge ID: 67890
Test Steps:
1. Local user verifies if the post is associated with them and the fridge.
2. Post component checks the associations in the database.
Expected Result: - The post is correctly associated with the user and fridge.

Title: Update User Profile Information
Preconditions:
- Local user is logged in.
- User component is initialized.
Test Data:
- New nickname: "JohnDoe"
- New password: "securepassword"
- New position latitude: 40.7128
- New position longitude: -74.0060
- New token count: 100
- New rating: 4.5
Test Steps:
1. Local user updates their profile information.
2. User component updates the user record in the database.
3. User component sends the updated information to Firebase.
Expected Result: - The user profile information is successfully updated and stored in the database and Firebase.

Title: Verify User Profile Information Update
Preconditions:
- Local user is logged in.
- User component is initialized.
- User profile information is updated.
Test Steps:
1. Local user verifies if the profile information has been updated.
2. User component checks the updated information in the database and Firebase.
Expected Result: - The user profile information is correctly updated and stored in the database and Firebase.

- Relation component is initialized.
Test Steps:
1. Local user creates a relation with another user.
2. Relation component creates a new relation record.
3. Relation component associates the relation with both users.
Expected Result: - A new relation record is created and associated with both users.

Title: Verify Relation Between Two Users
Preconditions:

- Relation component is initialized.
- Relation exists between two users.
Test Steps:
1. Local user verifies if the relation exists between them and another user.

Title: Change Fragment to Fridge Management
Preconditions:
- Main schema is active.
- Fridge fragment is available.
- Firebase database is active.
Test Steps:
1. Main schema changes the fragment to the fridge management fragment.
2. Fridge fragment sends a request to remove a product to Firebase.
Expected Result: - The fragment change is successful, and the request to remove a product is sent to Firebase.

Title: Verify Product Removal Request Sent to Firebase
Preconditions:
- Main schema is active.
- Fridge fragment is available.
- Firebase database is active.
- Product exists in the fridge.
Test Steps:
1. Main schema changes the fragment to the fridge management fragment.
2. Fridge fragment sends a request to remove the product to Firebase.
3. Firebase processes the request and updates the fridge inventory.
Expected Result: - The product removal request is successfully sent to Firebase, and the inventory is updated.

Title: Attempt to Remove Non-Existent Product from Fridge
Preconditions:
- Local user is logged in.
- Fridge component is initialized.
- Product does not exist in the fridge.
Test Steps:
1. Local user attempts to remove a non-existent product from the fridge.
2. Fridge component sends a request to Firebase to remove the product.
3. Firebase processes the request and returns an error.
Expected Result: - The product removal request fails, and an appropriate error message is returned.
